description.value:
Source: Ariadne's Book of Legends - Alpha v1.2, p. 88.

Heroic Path: Archmagus

Prerequisites: Spellcasting or Pact Magic. Tier I: Arcane Savant

Spell Resistance. You have resistance to damage from spells.

Greater Magic. Your spell save DC is increased by 1.

Heroic Perk: Erudition

Prerequisite: Arcane Savant

You automatically identify the school, casting time, maximum duration and general effects of spells being cast within 60 feet of you, or ongoing spells whose effects you can sense. When you are forced to make a saving throw against a spell you’ve identified in this way, you can use your reaction to gain advantage on the roll. Additionally, you learn 3 spells of up to 7th level from any spellcasting list. They count as spells of your class for you.

Tier II: Expanded Magic

Prerequisite: Erudition

Stalwart Concentration. When you roll a Constitution saving throw to maintain concentration on spells, the DC cannot exceed 30. You add your spellcasting ability modifier to saving throws made to maintain concentration on spells.

Unendurable Magic. Your spell save DC is increased by 1.

Heroic Perk: Arcane Mastery

Prerequisite: Expanded Magic

When you cast a spell, that spell cannot be nullified by magic of 7th level or lower.

Tier III: Archmagus

Prerequisite: Arcane Mastery

Ascended Magic. Your spell save DC is increased by 2.

Inexhaustible Conduits. You can use Legendary Points to cast lesser spells. You can expend 1 Legendary Point to cast a spell up to 3rd level and 2 Legendary Points to cast a spell up to 7th level.

Path Connections Arcane Marksman. Instead of the Erudition Heroic Perk, you can take the Magical Geometry Perk, changing to the Arcane Marksman path.

Third Eye. Instead of the Arcane Mastery Heroic Perk, you can take the Ascended Mind Heroic Perk, changing to the Third Eye path.

source.custom: Original en-US text from Alpha v1.2
